creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to Trond.Endrestol from comment #4)

To link and create an executable I used:

gcj48 --main=Hello -o Hello Hello.java

However, the executable isn't functioning well, so maybe it's some pilot error again:

trond@enterprise:~/java/hello-world>./Hello
Abort trap
